analysis_notes: Effect estimates are signed differences in objective_response probability. Main binary effects use response-rate differences or adjusted linear probability model coefficients. Continuous predictors are standardized, so continuous effects are response-probability differences per 1 SD. Interaction effects are additional risk differences from robust linear probability models adjusted for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, unfit_for_intensive, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, wbc_k_per_ul, blast_pct_marrow, albumin_g_dl, crp_mg_l, and nlr unless otherwise noted.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients not receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 0.2196 with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 0.1661 without it, a +0.0535 response-probability difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving intensive `treatment_7plus3` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients not receiving `treatment_7plus3` after adjustment for baseline clinical and molecular features.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability model coefficient for `treatment_7plus3` was only +0.0020, providing no evidence of a higher response rate after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients without `npm1_mutation` after adjustment for treatment and clinical covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `npm1_mutation` was +0.0675, consistent with a strong favorable response association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `tp53_mutation` after adjustment for treatment and clinical covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `tp53_mutation` was -0.0263, indicating lower response probability in TP53-mutated AML.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `complex_karyotype` after adjustment for treatment and clinical covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `complex_karyotype` was -0.0239, supporting an adverse association with response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase in `ecog_ps`.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1 SD higher `ecog_ps`, the adjusted response probability was -0.0354 lower.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1 SD higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo`, the adjusted response probability was -0.0201 lower.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.
Higher `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1 SD higher `blast_pct_marrow`, adjusted response probability was -0.0147 lower.
Per 1 SD higher `wbc_k_per_ul`, adjusted response probability was -0.0066 lower.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate, with a positive response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.
Higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1 SD higher `albumin_g_dl`, adjusted response probability was +0.0091 higher.
Per 1 SD higher `crp_mg_l`, adjusted response probability was -0.0078 lower.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd`, `treatment_midostaurin` is associated with a larger increase in `objective_response` than among patients without `flt3_itd`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_midostaurin` by `flt3_itd` interaction was -0.0168, opposite the hypothesized direction and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd`, `treatment_gilteritinib` is associated with a larger increase in `objective_response` than among patients without `flt3_itd`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_itd` interaction was +0.0125 but not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_tkd`, `treatment_gilteritinib` is associated with a larger increase in `objective_response` than among patients without `flt3_tkd`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_tkd` interaction was -0.0306, not significant and opposite the hypothesized direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `idh1_mutation`, `treatment_ivosidenib` is associated with a larger increase in `objective_response` than among patients without `idh1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_ivosidenib` by `idh1_mutation` interaction was -0.0472. This was statistically significant but in the opposite direction from the proposed benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `idh2_mutation`, `treatment_enasidenib` is associated with a larger increase in `objective_response` than among patients without `idh2_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_enasidenib` by `idh2_mutation` interaction was +0.0057 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is larger among patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than among patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction was +0.1528. Cell rates showed venetoclax/azacitidine response 0.3081 versus 0.1630 in unfit patients, but no benefit in fit patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is larger among patients with `npm1_mutation` than among patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` interaction was +0.1907, indicating strong effect modification by NPM1 status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients who have both `unfit_for_intensive` and `npm1_mutation` show an especially large positive `objective_response` interaction with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` beyond the pairwise effects.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted three-way `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` by `npm1_mutation` interaction was +0.4618. In the unfit/NPM1-mutated subgroup, venetoclax/azacitidine response was 0.6331 versus 0.1596 without venetoclax/azacitidine.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive`, `tp53_mutation` reduces the positive `objective_response` interaction with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted three-way `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` by `tp53_mutation` interaction was -0.1545. In unfit/TP53-mutated patients, venetoclax/azacitidine response was 0.1766 versus 0.1728 without it, while unfit/TP53-wild-type patients had a +0.1623 difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a smaller positive `objective_response` association with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `complex_karyotype` interaction was -0.0509, indicating attenuation of the venetoclax/azacitidine association in complex-karyotype AML.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a smaller positive `objective_response` association with intensive `treatment_7plus3` than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_7plus3` by `complex_karyotype` interaction was -0.0324, consistent with reduced response for complex-karyotype patients on 7+3.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a larger positive `objective_response` association with intensive `treatment_7plus3` than patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_7plus3` by `npm1_mutation` interaction was -0.0112 and not significant, so the NPM1 signal did not appear to be a 7+3-specific benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable `npm1_mutation` association with `objective_response` is smaller among patients with `tp53_mutation` than among patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `npm1_mutation` by `tp53_mutation` interaction was -0.0772. Cell rates showed essentially no NPM1 advantage in TP53-mutated strata.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable `npm1_mutation` association with `objective_response` is smaller among patients with `complex_karyotype` than among patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `npm1_mutation` by `complex_karyotype` interaction was -0.0984. NPM1-mutated, TP53-wild-type, non-complex patients had a +0.0908 unadjusted response difference, while complex-karyotype strata showed no advantage.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `secondary_aml` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `secondary_aml` after adjustment for treatment and clinical covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `secondary_aml` was +0.0004, essentially null and opposite the hypothesized adverse direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older patients, measured by higher `age_years`, have a lower `objective_response` rate, with a negative response-probability effect per 1 SD increase.
Patients with `sex_female` equal to 1 have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0 after adjustment for treatment and clinical covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Per 1 SD higher `age_years`, adjusted response probability was -0.0008; this was not significant.
Adjusted coefficient for `sex_female` was +0.0032; this small difference was not significant.
